text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I arrive at the track for Vodka's training.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
choice_data_list: Looks like you're in a good mood!
Looks like you're in a good mood!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sure am! I ate a bunch on my day off and slept
like a baby.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I even got to knock out my backlog of motorcycle
magazines.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now I've got a full tank of gas and I'm ready to
run with all I've got!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll be coming full-throttle out of the gate—I'll
blow everyone's minds!
